name: Blanket Order Analytics
query:
SELECT
BO.company as 'Company',

  BO.name as "Blanket Order:Link/Blanket Order:150",
  BO.from_date as 'From Date',
  BO.to_date as 'To Date',
  CASE WHEN BO.closed = 1 THEN 'Closed' else 'Open' END as "Status",
  BO.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
  BO.customer_name as "Customer Name",
  BOI.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
  BOI.description as "Description",
  (
       SELECT ICD.ref_code from `tabItem Customer Detail` ICD
    where ICD.parent = BOI.item_code and ICD.customer_name = BO.customer
   
  ) as "Customer Item Code",
  IFNULL(BOI.qty,0) as "Qty:Data:150",
  IFNULL((select sum(IFNULL(SOI.qty,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent   where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1),0) as "Converted Qty"  
  , IFNULL(BOI.qty,0) - IFNULL((select sum(IFNULL(SOI.qty,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI  inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent  where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1),0) as "Pending Qty"
 , IFNULL((select (IFNULL(SOI.price_list_rate,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI  inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent  where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1),0) as "Unit Price" 
 , IFNULL((select (IFNULL(SOI.discount_percentage,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI  inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent  where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1),0) as "Disc in Per " 
 , IFNULL((select (IFNULL(SOI.rate,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI  inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent  where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1 LIMIT 1),0) as "Rate" 
 , CASE WHEN (IFNULL(BOI.qty,0) - IFNULL((select sum(IFNULL(SOI.qty,0)) from `tabSales Order Item` SOI  inner join `tabSales Order` TSO on TSO.name = SOI.parent  where SOI.blanket_order = BOI.parent and BOI.item_code = SOI.item_code and TSO.docstatus = 1),0)) <= 0 THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE 'OPEN' END as "ITEM STATUS"

  
FROM
  `tabBlanket Order` BO
INNER JOIN
  `tabBlanket Order Item` BOI ON BOI.parent = BO.name
  where BO.docstatus =1
